<!-- GENERATED FILE — DO NOT EDIT. Source: docs/templates/skeletons/dockerfile-pipeline.txt -->

# Dockerfile — Cloud Run Job Pipeline Application

Multi-stage build: JDK for compilation, Distroless for runtime. Replace: PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT (SBT sub-project name), PLACEHOLDER_JAR (assembly JAR filename), PLACEHOLDER_MAIN (fully qualified main class).

## Stage 1: Build

```dockerfile
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS build

WORKDIR /app

COPY project/ project/
COPY build.sbt .

RUN sbt update

COPY . .
RUN sbt "PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT / assembly"
```

Copy SBT structure first for Docker layer caching; dependencies change less often than source code.

## Stage 2: Runtime

```dockerfile
FROM gcr.io/distroless/java21-debian12

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=build /app/PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT/target/scala-3.7.3/PLACEHOLDER_JAR app.jar

ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0", "-jar", "app.jar"]
```

Distroless: ~130MB vs ~300MB for JRE, no shell (no injection attacks), Google-maintained security patches. JVM tuning: -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0 uses 75% of container memory; JDK 21 is container-aware (reads cgroup limits). No EXPOSE for Cloud Run Jobs (batch workloads); add EXPOSE 8080 for Cloud Run Services. Cannot docker exec on Distroless; use Cloud Logging for debugging.

## .dockerignore

```
target/
.idea/
.bsp/
.metals/
.git/
docs/
blog/
.claude/
*.md
.github/
```
